notes: Passive dynamic microphone — no power input of any kind (no phantom power required, no battery, no external power supply). The SM58 has exactly one physical connector: a 3-pin male XLR output. Specs confirmed across Shure official documentation (pubs.shure.com user guide) and Markertek retailer listing. No rack-mount form factor.

ports.name: Output
ports.note: 3-pin male XLR professional audio connector; balanced output; rated impedance 150Ω (300Ω actual); sensitivity -54.5 dBV/Pa (1.85 mV) at 1 kHz
